# scm_forwarding_profile_destination (Resource)

ForwardingProfileDestination resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Basic forwarding profile destination with FQDN
resource "scm_forwarding_profile_destination" "example_basic_fqdn" {
  folder = "Mobile Users"

  name = "example-dest-fqdn"
  fqdn = [
    {
      name = "example.com"
      port = 443
    }
  ]
}

# Forwarding profile destination with IP addresses
resource "scm_forwarding_profile_destination" "example_ip_addresses" {
  folder = "Mobile Users"

  name        = "example-dest-ip"
  description = "Managed by Terraform - Destination profile with IP addresses"
  ip_addresses = [
    {
      name = "10.0.0.0/8"
      port = 443
    },
    {
      name = "192.168.1.100"
      port = 8080
    }
  ]
}

# Forwarding profile destination with both FQDN and IP addresses
resource "scm_forwarding_profile_destination" "example_mixed" {
  folder = "Mobile Users"

  name        = "corp-destinations"
  description = "Corporate destinations profile with mixed types"
  fqdn = [
    {
      name = "*.corporate.com"
      port = 443
    },
    {
      name = "api.example.com"
      port = 8443
    }
  ]
  ip_addresses = [
    {
      name = "10.10.0.0/16"
      port = 443
    },
    {
      name = "172.16.0.1"
      port = 80
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) alphanumeric string [ 0-9a-zA-Z._ -]

### Optional

- `description` (String) description of the destination
- `folder` (String) The folder in which the resource is defined
- `fqdn` (Attributes List) List of FQDN based destination entries (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fqdn))
- `ip_addresses` (Attributes List) List of IP address based destination entries (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_addresses))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The UUID of the destination
- `tfid` (String) The Terraform ID.

<a id="nestedatt--fqdn"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fqdn`

Required:

- `name` (String) alphanumeric string [*0-9a-zA-Z._-] and at most one $ by the end

Optional:

- `port` (Number) Port number for fqdn based destination


<a id="nestedatt--ip_addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_addresses`

Required:

- `name` (String) IP address with wildcards and CIDR notation support

Optional:

- `port` (Number) Port number for IP address based destination


## Import

The following command can be used to import a resource not managed by Terraform:

```bash
terraform import scm_forwarding_profile_destination.example folder:::id
```

or

```bash
terraform import scm_forwarding_profile_destination.example :snippet::id
```

or

```bash
terraform import scm_forwarding_profile_destination.example ::device:id
```

**Note:** Please provide just one of folder, snippet, or device for the import command.
